visual_style: Modern minimalist tech. Obsidian backgrounds, sharp white typography, 1px subtle borders, high contrast. No neon gradients, no generic purples/teals.

layout_spacing.philosophy: Asymmetric Bento grids, negative space, technical precision.

pages_and_sections.name: Hero Section
pages_and_sections.layout: Full viewport height (min-h-screen). Background image with black/50 overlay. Content left or center aligned.
pages_and_sections.components: Navigation bar (glassmorphism sticky top), H1, Tagline, Primary CTA (Contact) button, scroll down indicator.

media.description: Abstract cinematic light cutting through darkness

pages_and_sections.name: About Section
pages_and_sections.layout: Grid layout (grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-12). Text on one side, stacked images on the other.
pages_and_sections.components: Overline (ABOUT US), H2 (Story & Values), Body text. Images with subtle hover float effects.

media.description: Creative team working in minimalist dark office
media.placement: Primary about image, rounded-lg or sharp corners with 1px border
Secondary decorative image, overlapping or below primary

pages_and_sections.name: Services Section
pages_and_sections.components: 3 major cards. Each card contains an image covering the top half (or background with gradient fade to bottom), H3, and service description list.

pages_and_sections.name: Languages Marquee
pages_and_sections.layout: Full width, zero padding vertical. Overflow hidden.
pages_and_sections.components: react-fast-marquee. Text: 'ENGLISH — SPANISH — FRENCH — GERMAN — PORTUGUESE — ARABIC — MANDARIN — JAPANESE'. Style: text-5xl to text-7xl, text-transparent bg-clip-text outline-white (stroke) or text-neutral-800.

pages_and_sections.name: How We Work
pages_and_sections.layout: Vertical line connecting 4 steps. Left side step number, right side content.
pages_and_sections.components: Step cards with 1px border. Steps: 1. Discovery, 2. Strategy & Design, 3. Development & Automation, 4. Global Launch.

pages_and_sections.name: Contact Section
pages_and_sections.layout: Grid split: Left side large CTA text 'Let's build the future.', right side Shadcn form.
pages_and_sections.components: Form with inputs: Name, Email, Company, Service Interest (Select), Message (Textarea). Use Shadcn Input, Select, Textarea, Button. Ensure focus states have contrast.

pages_and_sections.name: Footer
pages_and_sections.layout: Top border, massive brand text, standard grid for links.
pages_and_sections.components: Massive 'LUMEN WORKS' at text-[12vw] font-bold. Quick links and social icons (lucide-react).

motion_guidelines.animations: Framer motion for section entry (fade in and translate Y).
motion_guidelines.interactions: Hover states on cards: slight scale (1.02) or translateY (-4px), border color brightens.

testing.attributes: Add data-testid to all forms, inputs, buttons, and navigation links. Ex: data-testid='contact-submit-button'

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing layouts. Use Shadcn for complex interactives (Select, Form, etc).
Do NOT use Inter for headings. Use Outfit for headings and Manrope for body text.
Never use purely transparent headers. Add backdrop-blur-xl and bg-black/60.
Ensure dark mode is forced. Background is #050505.
Create anchor links in the nav that smoothly scroll to sections using Lenis or standard scroll behavior.
Images MUST NOT exceed 80vh on mobile.
